name: padi.test.propagate
title: Propagate test profile
comment: A test/teaching profile that demonstrates the per-property propagate flag: writes to propagated properties are pushed to all active connections; non-propagated properties stay on the writing node's capability and are never visible to peers.

properties.name: sShared
properties.description: Provider-written, PROPAGATED - every connected receiver sees this value

properties.name: sLocal
properties.description: Provider-written, NOT propagated - stays on the provider's capability; receivers can never see it

properties.name: sPing
properties.description: Provider-written, PROPAGATED - a counter receivers auto-echo to cPong, proving the round trip

properties.name: cShared
properties.description: Consumer-written, PROPAGATED - the provider sees this value

properties.name: cLocal
properties.description: Consumer-written, NOT propagated - stays on the consumer's capability; the provider can never see it

properties.name: cPong
properties.description: Consumer-written, PROPAGATED - the echo of sPing
